import * as THREE from 'three'; import { floraPrimitiveFactories } from '../src/floraPrimitives.ts'; const statusText = { blocked: 'blocked', 'needs-work': 'needs-work', pass: 'pass' }; const roleLabels = { creativeDirector: '创意总监', artDirector: '美术指导', projectDirector: '项目主任', cto: 'CTO' }; const primitiveNames = { DiskFlower: '盘状花', LayeredDahliaFlower: '层叠大丽花/团瓣型', RuffledRoseFlower: '褶皱玫瑰型', StarPinwheelFlower: '星形/风车型', TulipCupFlower: '郁金香/杯型', TrumpetThroatFlower: '洋水仙管心型', DaturaTrumpetFlower: '大喇叭型', OrchidButterflyFlower: '兰花/蝴蝶型', CallaCurledBract: '马蹄莲/卷曲苞片型', UmbelMiniCluster: '伞状/小簇型', FullHydrangeaCloud: '绣球/云团型', FruitPodCluster: '果材/荚果型', HangingBellFruit: '吊坠风铃果型', FoliageGrassBranch: '叶材/草线/枝条型', LayeredRoundFlower: '层叠圆花', SpikeFlower: '穗状花', OpenSculptureFlower: '开口雕塑花', ClusterFlower: '簇花', BerryCluster: '果材', AirFiller: '空气填充' }; const targetPrimitiveByShapeId = { 'disk-face-flower': 'DiskFlower', 'layered-dahlia-form': 'LayeredDahliaFlower', 'ruffled-rose-form': 'RuffledRoseFlower', 'star-pinwheel-form': 'StarPinwheelFlower', 'tulip-cup-form': 'TulipCupFlower', 'trumpet-throat-form': 'TrumpetThroatFlower', 'datura-trumpet-form': 'DaturaTrumpetFlower', 'orchid-butterfly-form': 'OrchidButterflyFlower', 'calla-curled-bract': 'CallaCurledBract', 'spike-vertical-form': 'SpikeFlower', 'umbel-mini-cluster': 'UmbelMiniCluster', 'hydrangea-cloud-cluster': 'FullHydrangeaCloud', 'fruit-pod-form': 'FruitPodCluster', 'hanging-bell-fruit': 'HangingBellFruit', 'foliage-grass-branch': 'FoliageGrassBranch' }; const previewPalettes = { DiskFlower: ['#fff8e7', '#f7edd2', '#f0c83a', '#7f8e3e'], LayeredDahliaFlower: ['#f8c9d8', '#fff1f5', '#e7a7bb', '#86a762'], RuffledRoseFlower: ['#f8b9cf', '#fff3f6', '#e77da0', '#9bb36b'], StarPinwheelFlower: ['#ff8b32', '#ffd15a', '#e9565d', '#7aa65a'], TulipCupFlower: ['#ffbf5a', '#fff0c2', '#f58aa2', '#5d8a55'], TrumpetThroatFlower: ['#fff9e8', '#ffffff', '#ffc847', '#f08b36'], DaturaTrumpetFlower: ['#ffffff', '#f2e3ff', '#8a5ab8', '#58783f'], OrchidButterflyFlower: ['#f8c8eb', '#fff6fb', '#e078b8', '#cc8b4f'], CallaCurledBract: ['#fff7df', '#f6e8b5', '#f2b84c', '#6c8b57'], SpikeFlower: ['#8bb8ff', '#b699ff', '#d9d1ff', '#59775c'], UmbelMiniCluster: ['#ffffff', '#fff6d8', '#e8f5ff', '#89a86a'], FullHydrangeaCloud: ['#c9eea8', '#e9ffd4', '#a9d981', '#f3ffe6'], FruitPodCluster: ['#4566d9', '#273f91', '#bbd1ff', '#5f7a51'], HangingBellFruit: ['#ff9f26', '#ffd45d', '#78a55a', '#f7be45'], FoliageGrassBranch: ['#5f8f62', '#86b86f', '#c6d88a', '#2f573b'] }; const previewScenes = []; function escapeHtml(value) { return String(value) .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"'); } function list(items) { return `
    ${items.map((item) => `
  • ${escapeHtml(item)}
    • `).join('')}
`; } function statusBadge(status) { return `${escapeHtml(statusText[status] || status)}`; } async function loadData() { try { const response = await fetch('../data/aesthetic-review-dashboard.json', { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`); return response.json(); } catch { const fallback = document.querySelector('#fallback-data'); return JSON.parse(fallback.textContent); } } function renderGate(data) { const gate = data.gate; document.querySelector('#gate-card').innerHTML = `
${statusBadge(gate.status)}

${escapeHtml(gate.title)}

${escapeHtml(gate.summary)}

${list(gate.rules)}
${gate.links.map((link) => `${escapeHtml(link.label)}`).join('')}
`; } function renderRoles(data) { document.querySelector('#role-grid').innerHTML = data.roles .map( (role) => `

${escapeHtml(role.name)}

${escapeHtml(role.brief)}

` ) .join(''); } function renderPrimitiveGate(data) { document.querySelector('#primitive-grid').innerHTML = data.primitiveGate .map( (item) => { const ownerStatus = item.ownerStatus ? `

用户判定：${escapeHtml(item.ownerStatus)}

` : ''; const ownerFeedback = item.ownerFeedback ? `

反馈口径：${escapeHtml(item.ownerFeedback)}

` : ''; const ownerAcceptance = item.ownerAcceptance ? `

验收结论：${escapeHtml(item.ownerAcceptance)}

` : ''; return `
${statusBadge(item.status)}

${escapeHtml(item.humanName)}

${escapeHtml(item.primitive)}

${escapeHtml(item.acceptance)}

${ownerStatus} ${ownerFeedback} ${ownerAcceptance}

下一步：${escapeHtml(item.nextTask)}

`; } ) .join(''); } function renderReusableRules(data) { const rules = data.reusableAestheticRules || []; document.querySelector('#rules-grid').innerHTML = rules .map( (rule) => `

${escapeHtml(rule.title)}

${escapeHtml(rule.summary)}

原则

${list(rule.principles || [])}

拒绝信号

${list(rule.rejectSignals || [])}

验收：${escapeHtml(rule.ownerAcceptance || '')}

` ) .join(''); } function renderTargetShapes(data) { const shapes = data.targetShapeVocabulary || []; document.querySelector('#shape-grid').innerHTML = shapes .map( (shape) => { const primitive = targetPrimitiveByShapeId[shape.id] || ''; return `

${escapeHtml(shape.name)}

${escapeHtml(shape.id)}

对应模型：${escapeHtml(primitiveNames[primitive] || primitive || '未映射')}

例子：${escapeHtml(shape.examples)}

为什么需要：${escapeHtml(shape.whyNeeded)}

`; } ) .join(''); } function initTargetShapePreviews() { previewScenes.splice(0, previewScenes.length); const canvases = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-shape-preview]')); canvases.forEach((canvas) => { const primitive = canvas.dataset.shapePreview; const factory = floraPrimitiveFactories[primitive]; if (!factory) return; const scene = new THREE.Scene(); scene.add(new THREE.HemisphereLight('#fff4dc', '#182014', 1.9)); const key = new THREE.DirectionalLight('#ffffff', 2.25); key.position.set(2.2, 3.2, 4.6); scene.add(key); const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(38, 1, 0.1, 20); camera.position.set(0, 0.35, 4.1); camera.lookAt(0, 0.02, 0); const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ canvas, antialias: true, alpha: true }); renderer.outputColorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace; renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 1.4)); const model = factory({ seed: `dashboard-target-shape:${primitive}`, position: new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0), scale: primitive === 'FoliageGrassBranch' ? 0.92 : primitive === 'SpikeFlower' ? 0.84 : 1.02, colorPalette: previewPalettes[primitive] || ['#ffffff', '#f7d78a', '#80ad65', '#cc8b4f'], openness: ['OrchidButterflyFlower', 'TrumpetThroatFlower', 'DaturaTrumpetFlower', 'CallaCurledBract'].includes(primitive) ? 0.95 : 0.7, density: ['UmbelMiniCluster', 'FullHydrangeaCloud', 'FruitPodCluster', 'FoliageGrassBranch'].includes(primitive) ? 1.08 : 0.92, curvature: ['SpikeFlower', 'FoliageGrassBranch', 'CallaCurledBract'].includes(primitive) ? 0.86 : 0.42, role: ['SpikeFlower', 'FoliageGrassBranch'].includes(primitive) ? 'line' : 'secondary' }); model.rotation.x = ['DiskFlower', 'LayeredDahliaFlower', 'RuffledRoseFlower', 'StarPinwheelFlower', 'TrumpetThroatFlower'].includes(primitive) ? -0.7 : primitive === 'FoliageGrassBranch' ? -0.34 : -0.1; if (primitive === 'FoliageGrassBranch') model.rotation.z = -0.38; scene.add(model); previewScenes.push({ renderer, scene, camera, model, canvas, primitive }); }); } function animateTargetShapePreviews() { const time = performance.now() * 0.001; previewScenes.forEach(({ renderer, scene, camera, model, canvas, primitive }, index) => { const width = Math.max(1, canvas.clientWidth); const height = Math.max(1, canvas.clientHeight); if (canvas.width !== Math.floor(width * renderer.getPixelRatio()) || canvas.height !== Math.floor(height * renderer.getPixelRatio())) { renderer.setSize(width, height, false); camera.aspect = width / height; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); } model.rotation.y = time * 0.22 + index * 0.18; if (primitive === 'HangingBellFruit' || primitive === 'FoliageGrassBranch') model.rotation.y = time * 0.16 + index * 0.12; renderer.render(scene, camera); }); window.requestAnimationFrame(animateTargetShapePreviews); } function renderGroup(group) { return `
${group.images.map((src) => ``).join('')}
${escapeHtml(group.kind)}

${escapeHtml(group.title)}

${escapeHtml(group.englishTitle)}
${statusBadge(group.status)}

${escapeHtml(group.humanConclusion)}

${group.primitives .map((primitive) => `${escapeHtml(primitiveNames[primitive] || primitive)}`) .join('')}
${group.referenceLinks.map((link) => `${escapeHtml(link.label)}`).join('')}

正向信号

${list(group.positiveSignals)}

负向约束

${list(group.negativeConstraints)}

当前实现

${escapeHtml(group.currentImplementation)}

未通过原因

${escapeHtml(group.failureReason)}

下一步任务

${list(group.nextTasks)}
${Object.entries(group.roleReview) .map( ([role, text]) => `

${escapeHtml(roleLabels[role] || role)}

${escapeHtml(text)}

` ) .join('')}
`; } function renderGroups(data) { const grid = document.querySelector('#group-grid'); grid.innerHTML = data.reviewGroups.map(renderGroup).join(''); } function renderFilters() { const filters = [ ['all', '全部'], ['blocked', 'blocked'], ['needs-work', 'needs-work'], ['pass', 'pass'], ['positive', '正向'], ['negative', '反向'] ]; document.querySelector('#filters').innerHTML = filters .map( ([value, label], index) => ` ` ) .join(''); } function wireFilters() { const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.filter-button')); const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.group-card')); const empty = document.querySelector('#empty'); buttons.forEach((button) => { button.addEventListener('click', () => { const filter = button.dataset.filter; buttons.forEach((item) => item.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(item === button))); let visible = 0; cards.forEach((card) => { const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.status === filter || card.dataset.kind === filter; card.classList.toggle('is-hidden', !show); if (show) visible += 1; }); empty.hidden = visible > 0; }); }); } loadData().then((data) => { renderGate(data); renderRoles(data); renderReusableRules(data); renderTargetShapes(data); initTargetShapePreviews(); animateTargetShapePreviews(); renderPrimitiveGate(data); renderGroups(data); renderFilters(); wireFilters(); });
